mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, disabled, model_setting, model_group, persona_setting, avatar_ai_model_id, avatar_ai_prompt, total_tokens, last_processed_chat_id, sound_enabled, create_time, update_time FROM avatar_config WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, disabled, model_setting, model_group, persona_setting, avatar_ai_model_id, avatar_ai_prompt, total_tokens, last_processed_chat_id, sound_enabled, create_time, update_time FROM avatar_config
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO avatar_config (user_id, disabled, model_setting, model_group, persona_setting, avatar_ai_model_id, avatar_ai_prompt, total_tokens, last_processed_chat_id, sound_enabled) VALUES (#{userId}, #{disabled}, #{modelSetting}, #{modelGroup}, #{personaSetting}, #{avatarAiModelId}, #{avatarAiPrompt}, #{totalTokens}, #{lastProcessedChatId}, #{soundEnabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE avatar_config SET disabled = #{disabled}, model_setting = #{modelSetting}, model_group = #{modelGroup}, persona_setting = #{personaSetting}, avatar_ai_model_id = #{avatarAiModelId}, avatar_ai_prompt = #{avatarAiPrompt}, total_tokens = #{totalTokens}, last_processed_chat_id = #{lastProcessedChatId}, sound_enabled = #{soundEnabled}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE avatar_config SET disabled = COALESCE(#{disabled}, disabled), model_setting = COALESCE(#{modelSetting}, model_setting), model_group = COALESCE(#{modelGroup}, model_group), persona_setting = COALESCE(#{personaSetting}, persona_setting), avatar_ai_model_id = COALESCE(#{avatarAiModelId}, avatar_ai_model_id), avatar_ai_prompt = COALESCE(#{avatarAiPrompt}, avatar_ai_prompt), sound_enabled = COALESCE(#{soundEnabled}, sound_enabled), update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE avatar_config SET total_tokens = COALESCE(total_tokens, 0) + #{tokens}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE avatar_config SET last_processed_chat_id = #{lastProcessedChatId}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE avatar_config SET sound_enabled = #{soundEnabled}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId}
